com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs

Class AbstractArrayWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractArrayWriter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    PBoolWriter, PByteWriter, PCharWriter, PDoubleWriter, PFloatWriter, PIntWriter, PLongWriter, PShortWriter, PStructWriter

    public abstract class AbstractArrayWriter
extends java.lang.Object
    Positional state for forward-only array writers.

    • Method Summary

      long position() 
      void position(long position)
      Moves to position.

      • position

        public final long position()
        Returns:
        the current position

      • remaining

        public final long remaining()
        Returns:
        elements left before capacity

      • hasRemaining

        public final boolean hasRemaining()
        Returns:
        true if capacity remains

      • position

        public final void position(long position)
        Moves to position.
        Parameters:
        position - the new position
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position is out of range

      • reset

        public final void reset()
        Moves to position zero.
